what_it_does: Records metadata for a channel attachment that links a board item to the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
conventions: YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
target referenced with a board:// URI scheme
notes: A lightweight channel-attachment metadata stub that points a board item at the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What content or state does board item item-c45f427e represent?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches — the file is a board_items attachment referencing a target board item, though it contains only the relation metadata and no item content.
intention_signals: To catalog that a specific board item is attached to the dragnet-development channel and make that relationship discoverable.
contribution: Provides a persistent, timestamped index entry linking a board item to a channel via a board:// URI, supporting attachment queries without claiming to be the canonical record.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file of type board_items linking board item item-c45f427e to the dragnet-development channel with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record that board item item-c45f427e is attached to the dragnet-development channel for retrieval and relationship tracking.
